name: sap-remediator
description: S/4HANA brownfield remediation tooling for custom ABAP — detect, tier, and fix table/field breaks, with a page-cited Simplification-List knowledge base over MCP.

owner.name: TUM x Deloitte - AI Coding Skill 3

plugins.name: sap-table-field-remediator
plugins.description: Detect custom ABAP that breaks in an S/4HANA brownfield conversion, tier each fix by how much human judgment it needs, and emit a machine-readable remediation report. Bundles a page-cited Simplification-List knowledge base served over MCP.
